'''pashodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadmaal|wadmaal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadmaal|wadmaal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pashodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæshedeth|pæshedeth]] || [[word:pæshedej|pæshedej]] || [[word:pæshedesh|pæshedesh]] || [[word:pæshede|pæshede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pashoshodoth|pashoshodoth]] || [[word:pashoshodoj|pashoshodoj]] || [[word:pashoshodosh|pashoshodosh]] || [[word:pashoshodo|pashoshodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pashodoth|pashodoth]] || [[word:pashodoj|pashodoj]] || [[word:pashodosh|pashodosh]] || [[word:pashodo|pashodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pashofdoth|pashofdoth]] || [[word:pashofdoj|pashofdoj]] || [[word:pashofdosh|pashofdosh]] || [[word:pashofdof|pashofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pashodotho|pashodotho]] || [[word:pashodojo|pashodojo]] || [[word:pashodosho|pashodosho]] || [[word:pashodoko|pashodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pashodoth|pashodoth]] || [[word:pashodoj|pashodoj]] || [[word:pashodosh|pashodosh]] || [[word:pashodo|pashodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pashodothol|pashodothol]] || [[word:pashodojol|pashodojol]] || [[word:pashodoshol|pashodoshol]] || [[word:pashodokol|pashodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pashodothotho|pashodothotho]] || [[word:pashodojojo|pashodojojo]] || [[word:pashodoshosho|pashodoshosho]] || [[word:pashodoko|pashodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pashodothon|pashodothon]] || [[word:pashodojon|pashodojon]] || [[word:pashodoshon|pashodoshon]] || [[word:pashodokon|pashodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pashodothoro|pashodothoro]] || [[word:pashodojoro|pashodojoro]] || [[word:pashodoshoro|pashodoshoro]] || [[word:pashodokoro|pashodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
